zh.Scrooby, Nottinghamshire, England: 英國諾廷加姆爾史盧比
zh.lifeSummary: Mary於大約1569年出生在英國諾廷加姆爾史盧比。她於1592年與William Brewster在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾史盧比結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她於1620年移民到布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼普萊姆斯。她去世於1627年4月17日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼普萊姆斯享年59歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼普萊姆斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Mary于大约1569年出生在英国諾廷加姆爾史盧比。她于1592年与William Brewster在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾史盧比结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她于1620年移民到布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼普萊姆斯。她去世于1627年4月17日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼普萊姆斯享年59岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼普萊姆斯。

nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Maria via Old Welsh Meir. See Mary .

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.description: In 1620, after 2 rough months at sea, 102 Pilgrims landed at Plymouth Rock and established one of the very first English settlements in America.

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: Mary was born about 1569, in Scrooby, Nottinghamshire, England. She married William Brewster in 1592, in Scrooby, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She immigrated to Plymouth, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America in 1620. She died on 17 April 1627, in Plymouth, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 59, and was buried in Plymouth, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Mary est née environ 1569, à Scrooby, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre. Elle a épousé William Brewster en 1592, à Scrooby, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle a immigré au Plymouth, Plymouth Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique en 1620. Elle est décédée le 17 avril 1627, à Plymouth, Plymouth Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 59 ans, et a été enterrée à Plymouth, Plymouth Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Immigrata nel Plymouth, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America nel 1620. ja.Scrooby, Nottinghamshire, England: イギリスノッティンガムシュアイアスクルービー
ja.lifeSummary: Maryは約1569年にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアスクルービーで生まれた。1592年にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアスクルービーでWilliam Brewsterと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1620年にイギリス植民地アメリカプリモウス コロニープリモウスに移住した。彼女は1627年4月17日にイギリス植民地アメリカプリモウス コロニープリモウスで59歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカプリモウス コロニープリモウスにて埋葬された。

ko.Plymouth, Plymouth Colony, British Colon: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 플림우스 콜론이 플림우스
ko.Plymouth, Plymouth, British Colonial Ame: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 플림우스 콜론이 플림우스
ko.lifeSummary: Mary(은)는 대략 1569년 영국 노틴그함실르 스크루비에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1592년 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 스크루비에서 William Brewster(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1620년에 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 플림우스 콜론이 플림우스로 이민을 떠났다. 그녀는 1627년 4월 17일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 플림우스 콜론이 플림우스에서 59세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 플림우스 콜론이 플림우스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Mary nasceu aproximadamente 1569, em Scrooby, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra. Ela casou-se com William Brewster em 1592, em Scrooby, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela imigrou para o Plymouth, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America em 1620. Ela faleceu em 17 de abril de 1627, em Plymouth, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America, com 59 anos, e foi sepultada em Plymouth, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America.

ru.Plymouth, Plymouth, British Colonial Ame: плимоут, плимоут колони, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.lifeSummary: Mary родилась около 1569 г. в местности скруби, ноттингхамшир, Англия. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Brewster в 1592 г. в местности скруби, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она иммигрировала в плимоут, плимоут колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в 1620 году. Она умерла 17 апреля 1627 г. в местности плимоут, плимоут колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 59 лет и была похоронена в местности плимоут, плимоут колони, бритиш колоняль амирика.
